title: Add information when running `podman version` on client
body:
* Include service version information and headers

```
$ ./podman-remote-darwin version
Client:
Version:            1.3.1-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.12.2
Git Commit:         64d1a357e8299c5fcecd4141091424419111cdee-dirty
Built:              Wed May  8 10:28:56 2019
OS/Arch:            darwin/amd64

Service:
Version:            1.3.1-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.12.2
Git Commit:         64d1a357e8299c5fcecd4141091424419111cdee-dirty
Built:              Wed May  8 10:20:55 2019
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```


Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
